sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38902" key="e)piba/fia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιβάφια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, in Alchemy, <sense id="n38902.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">powders</tr_> for gilding and silvering, Zos.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.218B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
